name: The Hole Thing
tagline: Sonoma County's favorite tattoo & piercing shop since 1997.
seoDescription: The Hole Thing — Sonoma County's favorite female-owned tattoo, piercing & tooth-gem shop on Santa Rosa Ave since 1997. A family establishment, walk-ins welcome.

contact.address: 324 Santa Rosa Ave, Santa Rosa, CA 95404

hero.heading: Sonoma County's favorite shop.
hero.subheading: A female-owned, family tattoo and body-piercing shop on Santa Rosa Avenue since 1997 — custom tattoos, expert piercings, and tooth gems. Walk-ins always welcome.

images.heroAlt: The Hole Thing in Santa Rosa, CA

about.heading: A family shop, Sonoma County born
body: The Hole Thing started in 1997 in Cotati and moved to our Santa Rosa Avenue home in 2005. Nearly three decades in, we take pride in being a family establishment — female-owned, locally loved, and a name Sonoma County trusts for ink and piercings alike.

Walk-ins are always welcome and consultations are free. Browse our artists' portfolios, settle on a piece, and sit down with people who'll talk you through every step — first-timers and nervous grown-ups included. Yes, we do tooth gems too.

services.title: Custom tattoos
services.description: Original work and walk-in pieces from resident artists — including American Traditional — with portfolios you're welcome to browse before you book. Free consultations, any time.

services.title: Body piercing
services.description: Ears, nostril, septum, navel and beyond, plus jewelry changes and downsizes — done carefully by experienced piercers who keep it calm and clean.

services.title: Tooth gems
services.description: A quick, painless little sparkle. We're Sonoma County's go-to spot for tooth gems — in and out in a few minutes.

services.title: Kids' & first piercings
services.description: Family-friendly and gentle with first-timers, so little ones (and anyone nervous) are in good, patient hands.

hoursNote: Walk-ins welcome — call ahead at (707) 570-2879 or (707) 888-1269 for a specific artist.

sections.heading: Everything you can get done here
sections.intro: Walk in or book a free consultation — here's what we do best.

sections.quote: I got pierced by the owner and she was awesome — super friendly, and I felt totally comfortable the whole time.
sections.author: Yelp reviewer

items.quote: Such a soothing voice, and completely understanding of me being nervous. She turned the music down at my request and talked me right through it.
items.author: Yelp reviewer

items.quote: I've gotten four piercings here and I'll keep going back. Incredibly knowledgeable, and answers every question without overwhelming you.
items.author: Yelp reviewer

items.quote: Family-friendly and so gentle with my daughter's first ear piercing. We won't go anywhere else.
items.author: Yelp reviewer

items.a: Always. Walk-ins are welcome for piercings and tattoos — for a specific artist or a busy weekend, it's worth a quick call to (707) 570-2879 first.

items.q: Can my child get pierced here?
items.a: Yes — we're a family-friendly shop and happy to do little ones' ear piercings. Bring a valid ID and we'll walk you both through it.

items.q: Do I need an appointment for a tattoo?
items.a: Not to get started. Browse our artists' portfolios, book a free consultation, and we'll plan your piece together before you sit down.

items.q: Where are you, and when are you open?
items.a: 324 Santa Rosa Ave, Santa Rosa. Open Mon and Wed–Sat 11–6, Sun 12–5, closed Tuesdays.

sections.heading: Walk in, or let's plan it.
sections.text: Tattoos, piercings, and tooth gems — by some of the friendliest hands in Sonoma County.
